## How verified
- [ ] `uv run pytest` green
- [ ] `fidx doctor` green on my host
- [ ] e2e smoke run (if behavior affects index/search):
      `scripts/verify-install.sh` or `python scripts/e2e_smoke.py`
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
